document.title: Safety Certification Report - AC/DC Adaptor
document.documentType: UL safety certification report and certificate of compliance
document.revisionOrVersion: Report No.: E302267-D1015-1/A2/C2-UL; Revision 4; Standards Edition from 3.1 to 3.2

sourceSummary.oneLine: UL LLC safety certification report and certificate of compliance for BRIDGEPOWER AC/DC adaptor model families B(1)090(2)(3)(4) and (1)E90(2)(3)(4)(5)(6).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports UL Recognition and cUL Recognition safety evaluation for a component AC/DC adaptor intended for use as part of Medical Electrical Equipment.
keyPoints: The report covers safety evaluation according to ANSI/AAMI ES 60601-1:2005/A2:2021 and CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 (Amendment 2:2022).
Report types include US Certification (UL Recognition) and CAN Certification (cUL Recognition).
The AC/DC adaptor is rated input 100-240 Vac, 50-60Hz, 1.3A, with output ratings including 12Vdc, 15Vdc, 18Vdc, 24Vdc, and 48Vdc variants.
The product is described as a component power supply intended to be used as part of Medical Electrical Equipment.

Engineering conditions of acceptability require end-product evaluation for ratings, patient connection, temperature, leakage current, protective earthing, dielectric withstand, accompanying documents, and risk management.

evidence.claim: The document is a UL LLC Safety Certification Report for an AC/DC adaptor.
evidence.evidenceText: Underwriters Laboratories (UL LLC) Safety Certification Report ... Device Description: AC/DC Adaptor

evidence.claim: The report issue dates are 2016-03-25, 2017-02-16(A1), and 2023-10-25(A2).
The report covers model families B(1)090(2)(3)(4) and (1)E90(2)(3)(4)(5)(6).
The applicant is BRIDGEPOWER CORP and the manufacturer is the same as applicant.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant: BRIDGEPOWER CORP ... Manufacturer: Same as Applicant

evidence.claim: The base standards are ANSI/AAMI ES 60601-1:2005/A2:2021 and CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 (Amendment 2:2022).
evidence.evidenceText: Base Standard(s): ANSI/AAMI ES 60601-1:2005/A2:2021, CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 (Amendment 2:2022)

evidence.claim: The report includes US Certification (UL Recognition) and CAN Certification (cUL Recognition).
evidence.evidenceText: Report Types: ... - [ Yes ] US Certification (UL Recognition) - [ Yes ] CAN Certification (cUL Recognition)

evidence.claim: The AC/DC adaptor was safety evaluated according to the specified standards.
evidence.evidenceText: This report covers the Safety evaluation of the referenced model(s) according to the standard(s) specified above.

evidence.claim: The test item is rated input 100-240 Vac, 50-60Hz, 1.3A.

evidence.evidenceText: Rated Output: +12Vdc, 7.5A or +15Vdc, 6.0A or +18Vdc,5.0A or +24Vdc,3.3A or +24Vdc,3.75A or +48Vdc,1.87A

evidence.claim: The product is intended to be used as part of Medical Electrical Equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: Products are component power supplies intended to be used as part of Medical Electrical Equipment.
evidence.pageTarget: Medical Electrical Equipment Component Power Supply

evidence.claim: The adaptor provides 2 MOPP from primary to secondary/enclosure and 1 MOPP from primary to earth for Class I construction.
evidence.evidenceText: This AC-DC Adaptor provides 2MOPP isolation from Primary to Secondary/Enclosure(for Class I and Class II construction) and/or 1MOPP isolation from Primary to Earth (for Class I construction).

evidence.claim: The degree of protection against harmful ingress of water is IP22.
evidence.evidenceText: The degree of protection against harmful ingress of water is: IP22.

evidence.claim: The product was not investigated for biocompatibility, PESS, EMC, usability, or Annex Z of EN standards for MDD compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: The product was not investigated to the following standards or clauses: Biocompatibility, PESS, EMC, Usability, Annex Z of EN standards for compliance with the MDD.

evidence.claim: No test was conducted in the 2023-10-25 modification.
evidence.evidenceText: 7) No test was conducted in this modification.

evidence.claim: The 2023-10-25 modification updated the standards edition from 3.1 to 3.2.
evidence.evidenceText: 8) Update of Standards Edition from 3.1 to 3.2.

evidence.claim: The certificate states representative samples have been investigated by UL and are UL Recognized components intended for installation in complete equipment submitted to UL LLC.
evidence.evidenceText: Have been investigated by UL in accordance with the component requirements in the Standard(s) indicated on this Certificate. UL Recognized components are incomplete in certain constructional features or restricted in performance capabilities and are intended for installation in complete equipment submitted for investigation to UL LLC.

evidence.claim: The Certificate of Compliance does not authorize application of the UL Recognized Component Mark.
evidence.evidenceText: This Certificate of Compliance does not provide authorization to apply the UL Recognized Component Mark. Only the UL Follow-Up Services Procedure provides authorization to apply the UL Mark.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata productSignal is Unclassified; the source text itself identifies the product as an AC/DC Adaptor model family.
Some OCR/text extraction noise is present in enclosure descriptions, such as 'sahpe' and 'shiled', but core regulatory metadata is legible.
